meta.product: Falcon Aviation Command — Capability Portfolio & Lifecycle Control Tower (Demo)
meta.artifact: index.html (384,235 bytes, single file, zero dependencies) — v1.1 design + language QA

categories.implemented: Fully working in the demo and covered by an automated or live in-app check
categories.documented_limitation: Delivered in demo form with an inherent static-demo limitation stated in-app and in README
categories.deferred_phase2: Out of scope for a static single file; specified for the Phase-2 full-stack build
